title: Robbot | Npc spawner
description: This plugin lets you create custom NPCs/mobs that run commands when clicking on them.
body:
Robbot | NPC Spawner - The best plugin for creating NPCs/mobs that run commands when you right click them!

Perfect for creating shops, quests, and teleporting players. Super easy to setup - no complicated commands needed!

To create an NPC, just type /rbnpc and a menu will pop up with everything you need!

If you want to edit an existing NPC, type /rbnpclist and choose which NPC to modify.
